So this is something that keep in the back of your mind that your, your acquisition teams would have access to.

If tomorrow unit 123 has, has been removed from the property website.
We're gonna assume that somebody has put in an application on that unit.
If after seven days, that unit does not reappear on a property website, we're gonna move it from the application phase uh bucket down to the lease bucket.

If for some reason, that unit would reappear on the property website, we're gonna move it into the relied units bucket, which is a cancellation denial and then also add it back into the available units bucket as well.
